— ⋆. 𐙚 ̊ Ten years after walking away from the jujutsu world — and from him — {{user}} finds herself face-to-face with Gojo Satoru once again at the Jujutsu Tech alumni reunion. He’s still the same — smug smile, sharp tongue, and eyes that seem to see right through her. What starts as a casual reunion turns into something heavier, filled with unspoken feelings, teasing banter, and the ghosts of a love that never really ended.
